mapper.sql: f.er_id, f.acft_sn, f.acft_type_cd, f.regis_mark, f.ownr_ls_se_cd, f.fuel_type_cd, f.dnsty_se_cd, f.use_bgng_dt, f.use_end_dt, f.frst_reg_dt, f.frst_reg_user_id, f.last_chg_dt, f.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_er_acft_fuel f WHERE f.er_id = #{erId} AND NOW() BETWEEN f.use_bgng_dt AND f.use_end_dt ORDER BY f.acft_sn ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er_acft_fuel (er_id, acft_sn, acft_type_cd, regis_mark, ownr_ls_se_cd, fuel_type_cd, dnsty_se_cd, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{erId}, #{acftSn}, #{acftTypeCd}, #{regisMark}, #{ownrLsSeCd}, #{fuelTypeCd}, #{dnstySecCd}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_er_acft_fuel SET acft_type_cd = #{acftTypeCd}, regis_mark = #{regisMark}, ownr_ls_se_cd = #{ownrLsSeCd}, fuel_type_cd = #{fuelTypeCd}, dnsty_se_cd = #{dnstySecCd}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND acft_sn = #{acftSn} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er_acft_fuel (er_id, acft_sn, acft_type_cd, regis_mark, ownr_ls_se_cd, fuel_type_cd, dnsty_se_cd, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstErId}, acft_sn, acft_type_cd, regis_mark, ownr_ls_se_cd, fuel_type_cd, dnsty_se_cd, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM er.tn_er_acft_fuel WHERE er_id = #{srcErId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
